programme.title: TENGKULAK KECE IDAMAN
programme.desc: Nadia (Debi Sagita) is rescued from thugs by Boni (Ridwan Ghani), though all of his medicines are destroyed in the scuffle. Impressed by his selfless care for the villagers, Nadia mistakenly believes Boni is a doctor. Touched by his kindness, she gifts him her late brother's unused car. Their bond deepens when Nadia chooses Boni's village as the subject for her university thesis.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Usia 2 Bulan Udah Jadi Apa? Jadi-an
programme.desc: Yogi’s (Ridho Illahi) life brightens up with the arrival of a new PE teacher, Wina (Nabila Zavira). He is captivated when she tells him, 'True strength doesn't just come from the body, but from a strong mind and heart.' However, Yogi’s admiration turns to heartbreak when he discovers Wina has given her heart to someone else.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: Halumu dan Haluku Jadi Halufyu
programme.desc: Alya’s (Callista Arum) car is blocked by Thoriq’s (Kevin Hillers) wonton cart. While looking for her boyfriend, Ozi, Alya discovers a painful truth: Ozi has been dating another woman named Hana for three years. After a public breakup at Thoriq’s stall, Alya and Thoriq grow closer, sparking a jealous rage in Hana.

programme.title: BUNGA CINTA BERSEMI DI BENGKEL
programme.desc: When Fery’s (Hardy Fadillah) delivery van breaks down, he ends up in a heated argument with a female mechanic named Nabila (Naomi Zaskia). Their parents, who are old friends, notice that their children's personalities don't match traditional gender roles. To 'fix' them, they agree to a swap: Nabila must work at Fery’s flower shop, while Fery must get his hands dirty at Nabila’s garage.

programme.title: Tuhan Ijinkan Aku Berjodoh Sama Cowok Lele
programme.desc: Indri (Chantiq Schagerl) dreams of winning a roller-skating competition, but her path takes a detour when she meets Jojo (Christ Laurent), a catfish farmer. Jojo is haunted by a past breakup, and Indri find herself entangled in a mission to help him find his true love once again.

programme.title: Pesona Cowok Starboy Adalah Maut

programme.title: Mba Mba, Bagi Tutornya Dong Suhu
programme.desc: Upon arriving in Jakarta, Tisa (Adzwa Aurell) is falsely accused of being a pickpocket by Dul (Cakrawala Airawan). Later, Tisa rescues Maya from thugs, and as a thank-you, Maya invites her to stay over. The next morning, Tisa is shocked to find that the grumpy Dul is actually Maya’s older brother.

programme.title: Our Happy Days
programme.desc: A perfectionist architect and a cheerful AI developer clash over a business takeover. As their lives intertwine, they navigate family rivalries and corporate stakes to find unexpected comfort and love.

programme.title: Hit the Top
programme.desc: In the year 1993, K-pop idol Yoo Hyunjae accidentally travels through time to the year 2017. Discovering that he is presumed dead, he begins to investigate what exactly has happened while trying to adjust to life in the 21st century.

programme.title: Sweet Stranger and Me
programme.desc: A 30-year-old woman suddenly has a new father who is three years younger than her. She doesn't trust him much at first, but as time passes by, she accepts him as family. This new father is always on her side. He loves her unconditionally. What would happen to them?

programme.title: 1/100: Men Who Took Parental Leave
programme.desc: Only one in seven fathers take parental leave in Japan, mostly for under two weeks. This episode follows a man who took a full year off to raise two children, revealing a slice of modern Japan.

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Ep. 20 (R)
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Ep. 20 (R)

programme.title: Saturday Drama "Mary of Magdalene Restaurant" Ep. 1（New） (R)
programme.desc: Oikawa Shimon, a chef who has lost everything, drifts into Tsukihate, an imaginary town where those on the brink of life mysteriously gather. There he finds Magdala-ya, a tiny diner on a cliff run by Ria Arima-a mysterious woman with a scar on the neck. Through Ria’s cooking and her unconditional kindness, Shimon begins to reclaim the courage to live. Based on Harada Maha’s novel, this moving drama explores sin, redemption, and the irreplaceable value of life.

programme.title: Historical Drama "BROTHERS IN ARMS" Ep. 15 (R)
programme.desc: To strike back at the Asakura and Azai clans, Oda Nobunaga calls on Ashikaga Yoshiaki and Tokugawa Ieyasu (Matsushita Kouhei) for military support. Yet their response is slow, as they secretly hope for Nobunaga’s downfall. Meanwhile, Koichiro and Tokichiro try to buy time to help Ichi escape, but her heart remains with Azai Nagamasa, and their plan fails. As Nobunaga advances into northern Omi, the armies of Asakura and Azai face him across the Anegawa River, and the moment of battle arrives.

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Week 4 (R)
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Samurai Drama Selections "Crossing of Heat Haze" Ep. 1 (New)
programme.desc: Based on the popular period novel series by Saeki Yasuhide, this drama follows Sakazaki Iwane, a gifted swordsman known for his calm grace. Once a samurai of the Bungo Sekimae domain, he abandons his clan after a tragic incident and lives as a ronin in Edo. Portrayed by Yamamoto Koji, Iwane is a gentle and compassionate warrior who upholds justice, in a richly entertaining period series filled with swordplay, romance, human drama, and humor.

programme.title: Premium Drama "The Opposition" Ep. 2 (R)
programme.desc: A rumor emerges that a prestigious medical university has been lowering female applicants’ exam scores. Reporter Hiba Kikuno (Matsumoto Wakana) begins investigating and zeroes in on board member Kanbayashi Harumi (Suzuki Honami), who deftly deflects every inquiry. As Hiba pushes closer to the truth, the two women - each shaped by injustices in a male‑dominated society - find their convictions in direct conflict.

programme.title: Historical Drama "BROTHERS IN ARMS" Ep. 16
programme.desc: Tasked with swaying Azai retainer Miyabe Keijun (Donpei), Tokichiro is confronted with an impossible demand: a child to be taken hostage. Childless himself, he attempts to offer the child of Tomo (Miyazawa Emma), only to provoke her fury and be forced to turn to Koichiro instead. Meanwhile, the defeated Azai Nagamasa and Asakura Yoshikage (Tsurumi Shingo) seek refuge at Enryakuji Temple, leading Oda Nobunaga to order the temple’s destruction if it refused to submit.
